violations.text: Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (lettuce) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
Four dead rodents were observed on glue traps in corners of the basement area behind miscellaneous items. Dead rodents must be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the bar 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The floor in the basement area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per owner, owner has completed course and will take test Thursday/tomorrow. Owner to email inspector with proof once completed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

The floor where the patio equipment was stored has an accumulation of old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per owner, owner has signed up for servsafe course. Once course is completed, they will submit application to RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the basement have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

The basement floor and walls on the stairs to the basement was observed with a large accumulation of old rodent droppings. Establishment to thoroughly clean walls and floors in basement to allow for monitoring of any new droppings. Any new droppings should be reported to pest control so pest control can more effectively treat. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC turned off ice machine and was in the process of disposing of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. A container of soup was placed hot in the walk-in in a covered container greater than four inches deep. Per PIC, soup was cooling from about 3 hour earlier. Soup was 52 degrees. Soup was placed in hotel pan. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Multiple dead rodents were observed in the basement. PCS is visiting establishment 1x monthly. PIC get pest control to visit establishment prior to reinspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings and multiple dead rodents. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The basement floor and walls on the stairs to the basement was observed with a large accumulation of old rodent droppings. Establishment to thoroughly clean walls and floors in basement to allow for monitoring of any new droppings. Any new droppings should be reported to pest control so pest control can more effectively treat. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan cover in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust and other residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings in the basement. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
